## What is known about this category

This subnet provides infrastructure or meta-coordination for the network (registries, validation-of-validators, hashing, governance). Requirements vary widely — read the repo docs carefully.

## GPU / hardware

GPU requirements vary; check the repo docs for the exact model size.

## Reward shape

**Flat rewards:** all miners above a quality threshold earn equally. Low barrier to earning, but limited upside for the very best.

## Cost to operate a miner

✅ no paid API keys required · 💻 no GPU required · ℹ️ baseline estimate (check repo to verify)

**Monthly recurring:** ~$50 – $1,500 · **One-time setup:** ~$317 – $8,020

## Getting started (generic)

1. Search for this subnet's GitHub/Discord using the links below.
2. Set up a Bittensor wallet: hot+cold key pair.
3. Fund with burn fee + buffer (~0.0947 τ recommended).
4. Clone the subnet repo, run the miner in test mode first.
5. `btcli subnet register --netuid 39 --wallet.name <cold> --wallet.hotkey <hot>`
6. Monitor your score during the immunity window.
